001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.util;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.BoxProvider;
004import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.menu.Menu;
005import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.internal.holder.BoxInventoryHolder;
006import org.bukkit.Sound;
007import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
008import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
009
010public final class MenuOpener {
011
012    public static void open(@NotNull Menu menu, @NotNull Player viewer) {
013        var holder = new BoxInventoryHolder(menu);
014
015        holder.initializeMenu(viewer);
016        holder.applyContents();
017
018        BoxProvider.get().getTaskFactory()
019                .run(() -> viewer.openInventory(holder.getInventory()))
020                .join();
021
022        viewer.playSound(viewer.getLocation(), Sound.ENTITY_EXPERIENCE_ORB_PICKUP, 100f, 2.0f);
023    }
024
025    private MenuOpener() {
026        throw new UnsupportedOperationException();
027    }
028}
